leagueBriefing: The Western Conference playoff race tightened up on Friday night as the Rockets and Clippers both secured critical wins to bolster their postseason positioning. Houston edged out New Orleans in a thriller to climb into third place, while Kawhi Leonard matched a storied franchise record in a Clippers victory. Meanwhile, the Knicks stayed hot in the East despite a quiet night from deep, and the Cavaliers put on a clinic in Dallas to continue their dominant run.

games.headline: Durant hits clutch go-ahead jumper as Rockets climb to third in West
games.brief: Kevin Durant proved once again why he's one of the most reliable closers in the game, burying a contested 18-footer in the final seconds to lift Houston over New Orleans. The Rockets survived a monster performance from Dejounte Murray to move into the third seed in the Western Conference. It was a game of inches and late-game execution, as the Pelicans saw their chances slip away with back-to-back turnovers in the final 15 seconds.
bullets: Kevin Durant led all scorers with 32 points, bouncing back from an 11-point outing in his previous game.
Dejounte Murray scored a game-high 35 points on an efficient 14-of-18 shooting for the Pelicans.
Amen Thompson provided a significant spark for Houston with 23 points in the victory.
The win marks the beginning of a five-game homestand for the surging Rockets.
games.context: The victory moves Houston into third place in a tightly contested Western Conference playoff race.

highlights.title: PELICANS at ROCKETS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 13, 2026

games.headline: Cunningham turns facilitator as Pistons blow out Grizzlies
games.brief: Detroit continued its winning ways by dismantling a struggling Memphis squad, fueled by a balanced offensive attack. Cade Cunningham embraced a playmaking role, carving up the Grizzlies' defense to find open teammates all night. The Pistons took control early and never looked back, winning their third straight game by a double-digit margin and showing the kind of depth they'll need for a deep playoff run.
bullets: Cade Cunningham finished with 15 assists while taking only 11 shots from the field.
Six different Pistons players scored in double figures during the dominant victory.
The Pistons have won their last three games by an impressive average of 25.3 points.
Detroit remains in the top spot in the Eastern Conference standings with a 48-18 record.
games.context: Detroit solidifies its hold on the top seed in the East while extending its winning streak to three games.

highlights.title: GRIZZLIES at PISTONS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 13, 2026

games.headline: Brunson and Anunoby power Knicks past short-handed Pacers
games.brief: The Knicks used a strong second-half surge to overcome a gritty effort from the injury-riddled Pacers in Indianapolis. Jalen Brunson and OG Anunoby shouldered the scoring load, while Mitchell Robinson dominated the glass to prevent any second-chance opportunities for Indiana. Despite a poor shooting night from behind the arc, New York found ways to grind out a victory and keep their hopes for home-court advantage alive.
bullets: Jalen Brunson led the way with 29 points and nine assists.
Mitchell Robinson hauled in a career-high 22 rebounds to go along with 12 points.
OG Anunoby contributed 25 points and eight rebounds against his former coach's squad.
The Pacers have now lost 12 consecutive games as they struggle with widespread injuries.
games.context: New York continues its push for a top-four seed in the Eastern Conference playoffs.

highlights.title: KNICKS at PACERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 13, 2026

games.headline: Raptors pull off late-game comeback to stun Suns in Toronto
games.brief: Toronto erased a 10-point fourth-quarter deficit with a blistering late run to take down the Suns at Scotiabank Arena. Scottie Barnes and RJ Barrett delivered clutch baskets in the closing minutes, capitalizing on a series of Phoenix miscues. The Suns looked to be in control after three quarters, but the Raptors' defensive intensity rose in the final frame, holding Phoenix to just 23 points while pouring in 36 of their own to seal the win.
bullets: Toronto closed the game on an 8-0 run over the final five minutes to take the lead.
RJ Barrett hit a critical corner three-pointer with 3:35 left to give Toronto its first late lead.
The Suns led by as many as 10 points early in the fourth quarter before the collapse.
Scottie Barnes anchored the comeback with a double-double and elite defensive play late.
games.context: Toronto keeps pace in the Eastern Conference play-in race with a signature comeback win.

highlights.title: SUNS at RAPTORS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 13, 2026

games.headline: Mobley dominates as Cavaliers steamroll Mavericks in Dallas
games.brief: Cleveland put on an offensive masterclass in Dallas, shooting over 60% from the field in a lopsided victory over the Mavericks. Evan Mobley set the tone early with a massive first half, and the Cavs never let up, eventually leading by as many as 35 points. Dallas had no answer for Cleveland's ball movement and perimeter shooting, as the Cavaliers won their seventh straight game against the Mavericks.
bullets: Evan Mobley matched his season high with 29 points in just 23 minutes of action.
Cleveland shot 61.5% from the floor and knocked down 18 three-pointers.
Rookie Cooper Flagg led the Mavericks with 25 points in the loss.
Donovan Mitchell added 24 points, including 12 in a 41-point third-quarter explosion for the Cavs.
games.context: Cleveland earns its seventh consecutive win over Dallas as they maintain their hold on the No. 4 seed in the East.

highlights.title: CAVALIERS at MAVERICKS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 13, 2026

games.headline: Timberwolves stifle Warriors at Chase Center to end road trip on high note
games.brief: Minnesota's defense proved too much for Golden State as the Timberwolves controlled the pace from the opening tip. Despite a late flurry of points from the Warriors, the Timberwolves' balanced scoring and dominance in the paint ensured the lead was never seriously threatened. The win provides Minnesota with much-needed momentum as they continue their pursuit of a top seed in the Western Conference.
bullets: Minnesota led for the vast majority of the game, including an 11-point lead in the final minute.
Rudy Gobert anchored the defense and dominated the boards against a smaller Warriors lineup.
Golden State struggled with shooting consistency throughout the first three quarters.
The loss leaves the Warriors fighting to maintain their position in the Western Conference play-in race.
games.context: Minnesota stays in the hunt for a top-three seed, while Golden State's play-in position becomes more precarious.

highlights.title: TIMBERWOLVES at WARRIORS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 13, 2026

games.headline: Sensabaugh's 31 points not enough as Blazers outlast Jazz
games.brief: Portland rode a balanced scoring effort and a strong second quarter to fend off a persistent Utah Jazz team. While Brice Sensabaugh caught fire for the Jazz, hitting six threes on his way to 31 points, the Trail Blazers' depth proved to be the difference maker. Portland's ability to capitalize on Jazz turnovers and convert at the free-throw line late allowed them to pull away in the fourth quarter.
bullets: Brice Sensabaugh led all scorers with 31 points on 12-of-19 shooting.
Portland outscored Utah 38-20 in a pivotal second quarter to take control of the game.
Jerami Grant and Scoot Henderson provided steady veteran leadership and scoring for the Blazers.
The Jazz committed 17 turnovers, which Portland turned into significant fast-break opportunities.
games.context: Portland earns a much-needed win to stay in the mix for the final Western Conference play-in spot.

highlights.title: JAZZ at TRAIL BLAZERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 13, 2026

games.headline: Leonard ties franchise scoring record as Clippers down Bulls
games.brief: Kawhi Leonard etched his name further into the Clippers' history books, matching Bob McAdoo's record for consecutive 20-point games in a solid win over Chicago. The Clippers overcame the absence of Darius Garland by leaning on their depth, with Bennedict Mathurin providing a massive spark off the bench. Chicago fought hard behind a triple-double from Josh Giddey, but the Clippers' late-game execution at the Intuit Dome proved to be the decider.
bullets: Kawhi Leonard scored 28 points, marking his 44th straight game with at least 20 points.
Josh Giddey recorded his 11th triple-double of the season with 20 points, 11 rebounds, and 10 assists.
Bennedict Mathurin led the second unit with 26 points on 10-of-19 shooting.
The Clippers have won seven of their last eight games and moved to two games over .500.
games.context: The Clippers strengthen their grip on the 8th seed in the West, while the Bulls continue to slide after their West Coast road trip.

highlights.title: BULLS at CLIPPERS | FULL GAME HIGHLIGHTS | March 13, 2026
